// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.SpecialDependency, global::TestNamespace.SpecialDependency>(global::TestNamespace.SpecialDependency.Key);
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MyService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var s0_p0 = sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.IDependency>(SpecialDependency.Key);
                var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.MyService() { Dependency = s0_p0 };
                return s0;
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IMyService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.MyService>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
